Do not remove them (MSDOS.SYS needs to be \u003E1024 bytes).": "The following lines are required for compatibility with other programs. Do not remove them (MSDOS.SYS needs to be greater-than 1024 bytes).", "Freewave Lucifer F\u003Cck F^ck F\u003Eck": "Freewave Lucifer Fck Fck Fck", "Grayson|Reed": "Grayson/Reed", "Guinardó | Hospital
